---
title: "antigravity_bridge.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/cstar/core/antigravity_bridge.py"
loc: 84
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.75
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 4.26
overall_score: 4.04
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating clean_cli_output, process_request. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [re](file://re)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [tempfile](file://tempfile)
- [os](file://os)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `clean_cli_output`
- `process_request`
- `handle_client`
- `main`
